text.title: GitHub Actions — Security Hardening Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on exposure surface (external PRs, secrets, cloud auth).
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: inventory-and-pin
step.action: List all third-party actions; pin to SHA; wire dependabot.

step.name: migrate-to-oidc
step.action: For each cloud, configure OIDC trust scoped to repo+branch.

step.name: scope-permissions-and-audit-prt
step.action: Set explicit per-job permissions; audit pull_request_target usage.

step.name: wire-actionlint-validate
step.action: Add actionlint as required check; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
